description_long: This saxophone features a classic curved body with a prominent bell and a long, slender neck that arches gracefully to the mouthpiece. The surface is a muted brass or gold color, with a matte finish and no visible engravings or decorative etchings. The main tube is adorned with a series of round keys and pads, distributed along the front and side, typical of a standard saxophone key layout. The bell is moderately flared, hexagonal in shape, and oriented outward, with a smooth rim and no additional detailing. The neck exhibits a smooth, continuous curve, seamlessly transitioning from the body to the mouthpiece, which is visibly attached and black in color. Overall, the instrument appears solid and functional, with all essential components present but minimal ornamental features.
description: A matte brass-colored saxophone with a curved neck, flared hexagonal bell, and visible black mouthpiece. The body features a standard arrangement of round keys and pads, with no decorative engravings.
description_view_0: The saxophone is seen from the side, highlighting the curved neck, attached black mouthpiece, and the main keywork along the body.
description_view_1: This view shows the bell opening directly, revealing its hexagonal shape and outward flare, as well as the alignment of the main tube.
description_view_2: The back of the saxophone is visible, displaying the smooth, unadorned body and the continuous curve of the neck.
description_view_3: The opposite side view emphasizes the key layout along the body and the transition from the main tube to the bell.
attribute_bell_opening: The bell opening is hexagonal, approximately 12 centimeters in diameter, flared outward, and oriented horizontally. The rim is smooth with no visible decorative features.
attribute_key_layout: The saxophone has a series of round keys and pads distributed along the front of the main tube, with several side keys visible. The keywork appears standard, with no distinctive or missing keys.
attribute_neck_curve: The neck has a smooth, continuous curve with a gentle angle, seamlessly integrated into the body. No detachable joint is visible.
